title: 适当性 / Suitability
point: 方案匹配需求、风险承受、负担能力与时间。 / Match needs, risk, affordability and horizon.
keyfacts: 不推不适合高佣品 / No high-commission misfit
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Developing Appropriate Strategies and Solutions

title: 优先级与依据 / Priority & basis
point: 先保障应急后积累;推荐有合理基础、能解释为何适合。 / Protection first; reasonable basis explained.
keyfacts: 挂钩分析 / Tied to analysis
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Developing Appropriate Strategies and Solutions
